expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

Open it on your phone at ",{"type":"Code","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organization"]},"."]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":3},"children":["What's in there"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["📋 Itinerary — all 8 legs, August 3–20, with dates, stops, and your notes from tanzaniamemories.md","💰 Costs — every line from your spreadsheet, organized and searchable, with a running total of $3,344.20 USD (plus €2,707 in flights)","🏞️ Ngorongoro fees — the official tariff table from the PDF, so you can check anything Richard quotes","📸 Stone Town photo — saved with a description of that whitewashed courtyard","🎙️ Crater voice memo — Emmanuel recorded as your driver-guide, the bracelets for Athena Mari (~TZS 35,000), and the ranger tip flag (~TZS 5,000) that you want to ask Richard about"]},"children":[]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":3},"children":["One thing to follow up on"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"warning"},"children":["Your voice memo flagged an extra ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["TZS 5,000 ranger tip"]}," at the Ngorongoro gate that nobody told you about beforehand — Emmanuel mentioned it, and you said you wanted to ask Richard before the safari balance payment. That note is saved in the app so you won't forget, but you'll want to settle it with Richard directly."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Everything that was scattered across six places is now in one link you can open anywhere. If you get new info — a changed cost, another voice note, a photo from the trip — just tell me and I'll add it."]}]}

// Find concession and filming findings from the report
const concessionFinding = findings.find(fi => fi.toLowerCase().includes("concession"));

// Build the overview paragraph by introducing each aspect from the findings.
const penaltiesFindings = findings.filter((fnd: { heading: string; detail: string }) => fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("penalt") || fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("over-speed") || fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("fraud") || fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("off-road") || fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("hour") || fnd.detail.toLowerCase().includes("gate"));

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Main contact for safari. Balance $960 due on arrival.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Not Richard — the actual driver-guide on crater day. "Really knew his stuff."

contacts.name: Suricata Safaris Ltd
contacts.notes: 3-day group camping safari: Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Ngorongoro Crater.

cost_items.notes: $240 deposit paid, $960 balance due on arrival (cash USD post-2009 or Pesapal +5%)
Apply at visa.immigration.go.tz — visa-on-arrival no longer available
From Maasai lady at crater rim. Paid ~TZS 35,000. Exact USD ~$20-25.
~TZS 5,000 cash. Not mentioned beforehand — ask Richard about this.

itinerary_legs.name: Arusha pre-safari
itinerary_legs.notes: Arrive KIA, settle in before safari

itinerary_legs.name: Safari circuit
itinerary_legs.notes: 3-day group camping safari: Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Ngorongoro Crater. All meals & lodging included. $240 deposit paid, $960 balance due.

itinerary_legs.name: Zanzibar Stone Town
itinerary_legs.notes: Explore Stone Town, narrow streets, UNESCO heritage

itinerary_legs.name: Zanzibar beach Kiwengwa
itinerary_legs.notes: Beach & relaxation on north coast. The Rock Restaurant dinner Aug 15 18:00-20:00

memories.title: Stone Town Courtyard
memories.description: Low-angle view looking up into a narrow courtyard framed by whitewashed buildings with dark carved wooden balconies and arched windows. Bright sunlit scene with clear blue sky. Stacked projecting balconies, ornate lattice-style railings, mix of white plaster walls with dark timber details. Striped awning and open window shutters. Traditional Swahili/Zanzibar-style urban architecture in a tight, enclosed space.

memories.title: Ngorongoro Crater Day — Voice Memo
memories.description:
Key facts from Vasileios on crater day:
1. Driver-guide: Emmanuel (not Richard from the office). "Really knew his stuff."
2. Bought two beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the crater rim for Athina Mari. Price: ~$20-25 USD, paid ~TZS 35,000.
3. Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip expected at the gate: ~TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees. Nobody told them about this before.
4. Vasileios wants to ask Richard about the ranger tip before the safari balance payment.
5. Described the crater day as "one of the best days of my life."

ngorongoro_tariffs.notes: Crater descent gates close 16:00, exit by 18:00
Only 4×4 vehicles up to 3,500 kg tare weight allowed on crater floor
Covers entry, camping, guiding, filming. Excludes crater service & vehicle fees.

schema.title: Trip Contacts
schema.description: Key people, companies, and emergency contacts for the trip.

role.description: Their role (e.g. Safari operator, Hotel, Guide)

schema.title: Trip Cost Items
schema.description: Every cost line item for the trip, organized by category.

category.description: Cost category (e.g. Flights, Safari, Park Fees, Visas, Other)

unit_price.description: Price per unit in the currency

schema.title: Itinerary Legs
schema.description: Each leg of the Tanzania trip, August 3-20, 2026.

name.description: Short name for this leg (e.g. Cairo arrival)

schema.title: Trip Memories
schema.description: Photos, voice memos, and special moments from the trip.

schema.title: Ngorongoro Conservation Area Tariffs
schema.description: Official fee schedule from the NCAA tariff document. Searchable reference for every fee type.

category.description: Fee category (Entry Permit, Crater Service, Camping, Vehicle, Walking, etc.)

sub_category.description: Sub-type (e.g. Non-EA Adult, TZ Citizen, Public Campsite)

visitor_type.description: non_ea_adult, non_ea_child, tz_adult, tz_child, ea_adult, ea_child, crew, vehicle, etc.

unit.description: per_person, per_vehicle, per_day, per_night, per_landing, per_trip
